_note: Rigid mount transforms T_tracker_cam per camera role. Best-guess starting values derived from a CAD point-to-point measure + a verbal 35-deg Y rotation — VERIFY frustum placement in the Rerun 3D view and iterate. translation_m = camera optical center position in the tracker frame; rotation_wxyz = T_tracker_cam orientation (w,x,y,z). parent_tracker_role=null means the camera is standalone (not placed in 3D). Intrinsics live in realsense_cameras.json (camera property, not rig geometry).

right_cam._note: ASSUMED identical to left_cam mount (same bracket geometry). Verify/correct for the right arm in the viewer.
